/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/naive_rag.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naive_rag.dir/src/client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naive_rag.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naive_rag.dir/src/vector_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naive_rag.dir/src/openFHE_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/naive_rag.dir/utils.cpp.o -o naive_rag  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hberens/.local/share/mamba/envs/naive_rag/lib:/usr/local/lib /home/hberens/.local/share/mamba/envs/naive_rag/lib/libfaiss.so /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEpke.so.1.2.3 /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.so.1.2.3 /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEcore.so.1.2.3 -fopenmp -ldl
